productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Grip Sleeve Black Bags
description: Carry your netbook in style and absolute safety in this Grip Sleeve Bag from belkin. Made of a synthetic-elastane blend material, this bag protects your netbook from mild impact. With stretchable properties, it can easily accommodate the accessories as well. Netbook size: 10.2"" Made of a durable laser-etched elastane surface to stretch easily and provide extra grip and security Silicon surface with criss-cross grooved design for grip while carrying the bag and to use as a mouse pad Has a branded zipper and slider Mildly expandable to hold a netbook and accessories Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust"
